Past 7d: heavy iteration on PATH B (drop hC3) along two routes — Path C cleanup (round-4 firm stop-loss to option (δ)) and the post-OVERRIDE compound-automorphism arc (mg-84f2/c0c7/02c2 + mg-5f0c v6.x). 7d throughput: ~14 items closed. Bottleneck is now mg-651f — the (L2) structural fix — and the η₅ park gating any further A8-S2 unparking. No infrastructure debt has accumulated; the clean-axiom inventory on the headline is preserved.
